zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de la Veale於大約1329年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可特時，她的父親Robert de la Veale44歲，母親Anne Muskett44歲。她於1351年與Robert Burdet在英國結婚。她去世於1397年3月在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de la Veale于大约1329年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可特时，她的父亲Robert de la Veale44岁，母亲Anne Muskett44岁。她于1351年与Robert Burdet在英国结婚。她去世于1397年3月在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Veale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall) and Irish (Waterford): variant of Veal . This is the usual form of the surname in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bhial.

variants.name: Veal
meanings: nickname from Anglo-Norman French viel, Old French vieil ‘old’ (i.e. ‘the elder’). Without the article, this name is indistinguishable from the relationship name Vial , and there has also been some confusion with Vail and Vale .
nickname for a docile, calf-like person, from Middle English vel(e), veille, fel(e) ‘calf; veal’, Old French veel ‘calf’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Olaf  , also widely used in southwest Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de la Veale was born about 1329, in Huncote, Leicestershire, England, her father, Robert de la Veale, was 44 and her mother, Anne Muskett, was 44. She married Robert Burdet in 1351, in England. She died in March 1397, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de la Veale est née environ 1329, à Huncote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de la Veale, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Anne Muskett, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Burdet en 1351, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée en mars 1397, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de la Veale um 1329 in Huncote, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de la Veale 44 und ihre Mutter Anne Muskett 44. Sie hat 1351 in England Robert Burdet geheiratet. Sie starb im März 1397 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de la Veale è nata il circa 1329 nel Huncote, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Robert de la Veale, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Anne Muskett, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Robert Burdet nel 1351, nel England. Morì nel marzo 1397, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de la Vealeが約1329年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハンコトで生まれた時，父Robert de la Vealeは44歳，母Anne Muskettは44歳であった。1351年にイギリスでRobert Burdetと結婚した。彼女は1397年3月にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de la Veale(이)가 대략 1329년 영국 레이스스터실르 헌컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de la Veale(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Muskett(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1351년 영국에서 Robert Burdet(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1397년 3월 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de la Veale nasceu aproximadamente 1329, em Huncote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de la Veale, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Anne Muskett, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Burdet em 1351, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em março de 1397, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de la Veale родилась около 1329 г. в местности хункот, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de la Veale было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Muskett, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Burdet в 1351 г. в местности Англия. Она умерла марта 1397 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de la Veale nació aproximadamente 1329, en Huncote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de la Veale, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Anne Muskett, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Robert Burdet en 1351, en Inglaterra. Murió en marzo de 1397, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
